title: [FIRRTL] Avoid inefficient module walks in EmitOMIR
body:
The `EmitOMIR` pass has two places where the entire contents of a `FModuleOp` are walked just to find a single instance by name.

This PR adds a lookup table for instances by parent module and name, which is constructed during the initial, unavoidable walk of the IR that the pass has to perform anyway. The other walks are then removed in favor of a lookup into this table.

This also restructures the removal of temporary NLAs to have better scaling by building a set of instance ops with NLA participation and a set of all NLA symbol names to be removed, and then walking the set of instance ops and removing annotations referring NLAs in the second set.

Fixes a significant scaling problem in EmitOMIR.
